task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the patient record for Dolores Welch.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the HospitalRun interface displaying the patient profile or dashboard for 'Dolores Welch' (or patient ID 'P00010').

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the form or modal to add a new photo/image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Add Photo', 'New Image', or similar upload form/modal open within the patient's record in HospitalRun.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct image file was selected for upload.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the file name 'patient_photo.jpg' in the file upload input field, or a system file picker dialog showing it selected from the /home/ga/Documents/ folder.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct description was entered for the photo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text 'Patient Identification Photo - Front View' entered into the description, notes, or title text field of the photo upload form.

task_completion.description: Verify the photo upload was submitted and saved to the patient's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the uploaded photo appearing in the patient's list of images/records, or a success notification indicating the photo was successfully added to Dolores Welch's profile.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the HospitalRun web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be clicking and typing within a web browser showing HospitalRun, not using terminal commands (like curl or python scripts) to interact with the backend database directly.

integrity.description: Verify the file was actually uploaded through the browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file selection should occur via the browser's native file picker dialog or drag-and-drop functionality, rather than typing the file path into an unrelated text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) should not be open or used to artificially insert the photo or description text into the webpage DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target patient is Dolores Welch (ID: P00010). The required photo file is 'patient_photo.jpg' located in '/home/ga/Documents/'. The exact description to be entered is 'Patient Identification Photo - Front View' (the verifier strictly checks for the keywords: identification, photo, front, view).
